magic_items.name: Elemental Gem
magic_items.description: Breaking the gem summons an elemental tied to the gem type for up to 1 hour; it understands your languages, obeys your commands, and acts after you in initiative.

magic_items.name: Eversmoking Bottle
magic_items.description: Opening the bottle creates a heavily obscuring smoke cloud in a 60-foot emanation that grows while the bottle stays open and disperses after closing or strong wind.

magic_items.name: Eyes of Charming
magic_items.description: These attuned crystal lenses hold 3 charges and let the wearer cast Charm Person with save DC 13, regaining charges daily at dawn.

magic_items.name: Spell Scroll
magic_items.description: A spell scroll of level 2 or 3 uses the spell's normal casting time, is consumed after casting, and uses save DC 13 or 15 and attack bonus +5 or +7 depending on spell level.
